name: Prostate Cancer Synoptic Report
description: Synoptic pathology report template for prostate cancer

findings.technique: Radical prostatectomy / core biopsy specimen submitted for pathological examination. Specimen inked and serially sectioned.
findings.comparison: Clinical history: [elevated PSA / prostate cancer diagnosis]. Pre-operative PSA: [X] ng/mL. Prior biopsy: [positive/negative] at [location]. MRI: [PI-RADS X] lesion at [location].

sections.name: Specimen Type
sections.content: Specimen type: [Radical prostatectomy (open/laparoscopic/robotic) / TURP / Core biopsy]

sections.name: Histologic Type
sections.content: Histologic type: [Acinar adenocarcinoma / Ductal adenocarcinoma / Urothelial carcinoma / Other]. [Primary pattern: X%] [Secondary pattern: X% if present].

sections.name: Gleason Score
sections.content: Gleason score (ISUP Grade Group): [Primary 3+3=6 / 3+4=7 / 4+3=7 / 3+5=8 / 4+5=9 / 5+5=10]. Grade Group: [1 / 2 / 3 / 4 / 5].

sections.name: Tumor Extent
sections.content: Extent of carcinoma: [focal / multifocal]. [Percentage of prostate involved: X%]. [Bilateral disease: present/absent].

sections.name: Extraprostatic Extension
sections.content: Extraprostatic extension (EPE): [Present / Absent]. Location: [posterior / anterior / lateral / apex]. [Extent: focal / established]. [Seminal vesicle invasion: present/absent].

sections.name: Margins
sections.content: Surgical margin: [Negative / Positive (focal / extensive)]. [Positive margin location: X]. [Margin involvement: X mm].

sections.name: Lymph Nodes
sections.content: Lymph nodes: [X] examined, [X] positive for metastasis. [Bilateral pelvic lymph node dissection: performed/not performed]. [Extranodal extension: present/absent].

sections.name: Pathologic Stage
sections.content: pT stage: [pT2 (organ confined) / pT2a / pT2b / pT2c / pT3a / pT3b / pT4]. pN stage: [pN0 / pN1].

sections.name: Ancillary Studies
sections.content: Immunohistochemistry: [PIN4 cocktail / p63 / p504s]. [Perineural invasion: present/absent]. [Cribriform pattern: present/absent].

impression:
1. [Histologic type], Gleason [X] (ISUP Grade Group [X])
2. [pT stage], [Margins: positive/negative], [EPE: present/absent]
3. Lymph nodes: [X] positive out of [X] examined
4. [Seminal vesicle / bladder neck] involvement: [present/absent]
5. [AJCC 8th edition stage: pT[X] pN[X] M[X]]
author: RadReport Templates
